task_completion.description: Update the status of the three high-priority service requests to 'In Progress'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a request list view or individual ticket screens showing ticket IDs 1001, 1003, and 1004 with their Status set to 'In Progress'.

task_completion.description: Assign the three high-priority service requests to the 'administrator' technician
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the request list view or individual ticket screens showing ticket IDs 1001, 1003, and 1004 with 'administrator' listed under the Technician column or field.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Problems module and initiate a new Problem record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'New Problem' form or the Problems module interface indicating a new problem is being created.

task_completion.description: Set the Problem record title and priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Problem record displaying the title 'Recurring SLA Compliance Failures - High Priority Response Times' (or containing 'SLA Compliance Failures') and the Priority field set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Link the three service requests to the new Problem record as related incidents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Related Incidents', 'Linked Requests', or 'Incidents' tab within the Problem record showing ticket IDs 1001, 1003, and 1004 successfully attached/linked.

integrity.description: The agent used the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the actions were performed in a web browser displaying the ServiceDesk Plus interface, not via terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a mock-up or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard browser UI elements, correct application URLs, and interactive web elements (dropdowns, tabs) rather than static text files or HTML editors.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing PostgreSQL commands (e.g., psql, UPDATE statements) modifying the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target service requests to be updated and linked are exactly IDs 1001, 1003, and 1004. Their target status must be 'In Progress' and the target technician must be 'administrator'. The new Problem record must be High priority and its title should be 'Recurring SLA Compliance Failures - High Priority Response Times' (or at minimum contain 'SLA Compliance Failures').
